name: Boulevard
description_short: Boulevard Brewing Co. is a craft brewery based in Kansas City, MO, operating a public brewery facility with tours, tastings, and events—not a financial services company.
description_long: Boulevard Brewing Co. is a craft brewery located in Kansas City, Missouri, established as a beverage production and hospitality business. The company operates a physical brewery with an attached Tours & Rec Center open to the public seven days a week. Their primary business is the production and sale of craft beers and beverages under brand names like 'The Quirk,' sold both on-site and through distribution. The Tours & Rec Center features multiple bars, daily brewery tours, curated beer tastings, special events, a gift shop, and a bottle shop. Boulevard's website content focuses entirely on their beer products, tour experiences, event rentals, and social engagement through newsletters and podcasts about recipes and brewing culture. There is no mention of any financial products, lending services, credit offerings, or consumer finance tools. The company operates as a traditional hospitality and beverage manufacturer, not as a fintech or financial services provider. Boulevard Brewing Co. was categorized under 'payday-alternatives' in error, likely due to URL matching or database misconfiguration. The company provides zero consumer finance services and should not appear in any financial products database. This is a factual misclassification requiring immediate correction. Many banks offer installment loans with fixed monthly payments, giving borrowers a clear payoff timeline.
